mapper.update:
update elderly
user_id = #{userId}, name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, age = #{age}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address}, dining_point_id = #{diningPointId}, grid_code = #{gridCode}, health_info = #{healthInfo}, special_needs = #{specialNeeds}, id_card = #{idCard}, image = #{image}, update_time = #{updateTime}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted},
where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select e.id, e.user_id as userId, fp.id as familyProfileId, u.username as familyUsername, u.name as familyName, u.phone as familyPhone, e.name, e.gender, e.age, e.phone, e.address, e.dining_point_id as diningPointId, dp.name as diningPointName, e.grid_code as gridCode, e.health_info as healthInfo, e.special_needs as specialNeeds, e.id_card as idCard, e.image, e.create_time as createTime, e.update_time as updateTime, e.is_deleted as isDeleted from elderly e left join dining_point dp on e.dining_point_id = dp.id left join user u on e.user_id = u.id left join family_profile fp on fp.user_id = e.user_id and fp.is_deleted = 0 where e.id = #{id} and e.is_deleted = 0 limit 1
